chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1575 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 5276/2022 For orders on office objections For orders on M.A. 5277/2022 For orders on M.A. 5278/2022 For hearing of main case 13.04.2022 Mr. Mir Murtaza Abro advocate for petitioner. ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. Petitioner claims to have been elected as treasurer in a body called Pakistan Orthopedic Association; Bait ul Shifa Bone Trauma Clinic Dodai. He claims to have been removed from this post by the Association and hence his removal is challenged in this petition. We have inquired from the counsel as to how this petition is maintainable against a private body named as above, he hardly able to answer the query. We are afraid we cannot issue any writ against the private body which is called Pakistan Orthopedic Association. In case petitioner claims to be have been removed unlawfully he may avail the remedy available to him under the law under the plenary jurisdiction or as he deems fit and proper under the circumstances of the case. The petition being misconceived is dismissed along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
